pacing: Moderate, with pauses after key definitions
framing_patterns: Motivate with a question or scenario, then explain the idea, then tie back to the learning goal.
audience_address: Speak directly to students; occasional inclusive we
humor_and_asides: Optional light asides; never at the expense of clarity
vocabulary_register: Professional but plain language; define jargon when first used
rhythm_and_emphasis: Alternate short punchy lines with short explanatory paragraphs
narration_guidance: Sound like a live lecture: confident, warm, and precise. The pipeline replaces this file using LectureTranscript when you run without --skip-style.
